headline: Textron: Not My Favorite Aerospace And Defense Stock, But It Is A Strong Buy Now
summary: Textron's recent underperformance is attributed to geopolitical tensions, but revenue and EPS estimates show resilience. See why TXT stock is upgraded to strong buy.
